testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_227] Ensure KMS key is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_33] Ensure KMS key policy does not contain wildcard (*) principal
[NONE][CKV_AWS_7] Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_70] Ensure S3 bucket does not allow an action with any Principal

[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it

[NONE][CKV_AWS_116] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)

failure.message: Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.viajes File: \lambda-viajes.tf: 70-103 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-aws-lambda-function-is-configured-for-a-dead-letter-queue-dlq
70 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "viajes" { 71 | function_name = "viajes" 72 | handler = "index.handler" 73 | runtime = "nodejs20.x" 74 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_viajes_exec_role.arn // El arn es el ID para conectar el rol con el recurso 75 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_viajes.output_path 76 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_viajes.output_base64sha512 77 | 78 | environment { 79 | variables = { 80 | DB_HOST = "db-taxis-viajes-usuarios.cbmia0266pjz.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com" //endpoint 81 | DB_USER = "IACgrupo7" //master username 82 | DB_PASSWORD = "grupo7_rds" //password 83 | DB_NAME = "db-taxis-viajes-usuarios" 84 | } 85 | } 86 | 87 | kms_key_arn = aws_kms_key.lambda_env_key.arn 88 | reserved_concurrent_executions = 50 89 | tracing_config { 90 | mode = "Active" 91 | } 92 | 93 | vpc_config { 94 | subnet_ids = [ 95 | data.aws_subnet.public1-us-east-2a.id, //Definir a que subnet ira la lambda 96 | data.aws_subnet.public2-us-east-2b.id 97 | ] 98 | security_group_ids = [data.aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] //Definir el security group 99 | } 100 | 101 | code_signing_config_arn = aws_lambda_code_signing_config.example.arn 102 | 103 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_47] Ensure AWS CloudFront attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability

failure.message: Ensure AWS CloudFront attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudfront_distribution.cdn File: \cloudfront.tf: 10-73 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-47
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.
